summary: PR 2424 decompiled and improved several functions in src/melee/gm/gm_1A4C.c, updated gm_1A4C.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures, and exposed several gmregtyfall scene/archive globals through gmregtyfall.h for use by gm_1A4C. The bot report records two new matches, gm_801A8D54 and fn_801A7FB4, plus partial improvements for gm_801A85E4, gm_801A9630, gm_801A7B00, gm_801A9094, and related data sections.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; replaces multiple function stubs with C implementations and adds includes, local/static globals, helper inlines, PAD_STACK usage, JObj/CObj/Fog/LObj setup, character display ordering, and archive lookups.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gm_1A4C.c added 412 deleted 18 hunks 5
raw_diff: gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_801A8D54, gm_801A9094, gm_801A9630 bodies added
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists gm_801A8D54 and fn_801A7FB4 as new matches and four function improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for recovered gm_1A4C functions.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gm_1A4C.h added 5 deleted 5 hunks 1
raw_diff: gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_801A8D54, gm_801A9094, gm_801A9630 changed from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete prototypes

key_files.role: Changed several file-static scene/archive globals to externally visible definitions so gm_1A4C can reference them.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gmregtyfall.c added 6 deleted 6 hunks 1
raw_diff: gm_804D6798, gm_804D679C, gm_804D67A0, gm_804D67A4, gm_804D67A8, gm_804D67AC changed from static to global

key_files.role: Published extern declarations for gmregtyfall globals and added sc forward include needed for SceneDesc.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gmregtyfall.h added 8 deleted 0 hunks 2
raw_diff: added <melee/sc/forward.h> and externs for gm_804D6798, gm_804D679C, gm_804D67A0, gm_804D67A4, gm_804D67A8, gm_804D67AC

what_changed.text: Implemented gm_801A7B00 to create light, camera, main JObj, and character display GObjs, set animations, apply character-dependent transforms through fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSet* helpers, walk a JObj tree, and bind constraints with lb_8000C1C0/lb_8000C290.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A7B00 body added
text_corpus: bot report shows gm_801A7B00 improved from 0.00% to 97.59%

what_changed.text: Refactored fn_801A7FB4's repeated character-count loops into two inline helpers and reached a reported 100.00% match for the function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801A7FB4_inline and fn_801A7FB4_inline2 added; fn_801A7FB4 calls them
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_801A7FB4 as a new match, +3 bytes, 99.14% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Implemented gm_801A85E4 as position logic using angle bands, HSD_Randf, cosf/sinf, and HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Z.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A85E4 body added and <MSL/math.h> included
text_corpus: bot report shows gm_801A85E4 improved from 0.00% to 99.60%

what_changed.text: Implemented gm_801A8D54 to build and sort a 0x1A-entry character index list using gm_801A659C, gm_801BEFB0, un_803048C0, CKIND_ZELDA/CKIND_SEAK checks, and gm_80480AD0 random ordering data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A8D54 body added
text_corpus: bot report lists gm_801A8D54 as a new match, +832 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Implemented gm_801A9094 to load trophy display data from gm_804D679C, create display GObjs, allocate/root JObjs, attach child and background joints, apply animations, and call gm_801A85E4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A9094 body added
text_corpus: bot report shows gm_801A9094 improved from 0.00% to 96.65%

what_changed.text: Implemented gm_801A9630 to initialize display arrays/random values and create fog, light, camera, background, character display, and character JObj GObjs for the mode setup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A9630 body added
text_corpus: bot report shows gm_801A9630 improved from 0.00% to 96.16%

what_changed.text: Updated gm_1A4C.h with concrete signatures for five recovered functions and moved six gmregtyfall globals from file-static definitions to extern declarations in gmregtyfall.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1A4C.h prototype changes
raw_diff: gmregtyfall.c static removals and gmregtyfall.h extern additions

smart_moves.text: Updated owning headers when function signatures became clear, matching the loaded truthful-headers-and-includes standard.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1A4C.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replacements

smart_moves.text: Used existing typed HSD and scene structures for many accesses, such as HSD_GObj, HSD_CObj, HSD_JObj, HSD_Fog, HSD_LObj, SceneDesc, HSD_Archive, TyDspEntry, and HSD_CameraDescPerspective, rather than raw pointer arithmetic in the shown diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A7B00, gm_801A9094, gm_801A9630 declarations and typed member accesses

smart_moves.text: Kept the asset string "ToyDspStand_Top_joint" inline in the code instead of introducing a new global string symbol.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_ArchiveGetPublicAddress(gm_804D679C, "ToyDspStand_Top_joint")

smart_moves.text: Used natural loops for 0x1A-entry character lists and initialization instead of duplicating generated repeated blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: loops in fn_801A7FB4_inline, fn_801A7FB4_inline2, gm_801A8D54, gm_801A9630

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering gm_1A4C setup functions, concrete HSD object types and SceneDesc fields can express much of the camera/light/fog/JObj setup directly; this improves reviewability and keeps header signatures truthful.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typed declarations and member accesses in gm_801A7B00 and gm_801A9630
raw_diff: gm_1A4C.h prototype recovery

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated character-slot scans over 0x1A entries are viable natural loops in this area and can still match or improve matching when shaped carefully.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: 0x1A loops in fn_801A7FB4_inline, fn_801A7FB4_inline2, gm_801A8D54, gm_801A9630
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_801A7FB4 and gm_801A8D54 as 100.00% matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Inline helper extraction can be a matching tactic for repeated local logic, but this PR does not include explanation proving the helpers were original source rather than codegen steering.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801A7FB4_inline and fn_801A7FB4_inline2 added
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_801A7FB4 as a new match

naming_conventions.name: address-style names retained
naming_conventions.text: Recovered functions and globals mostly keep address-style names such as gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_80480A00, gm_80480AD0, and gm_804D67B8, avoiding unsupported semantic renames.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added functions and static/global declarations retain address-style identifiers

naming_conventions.name: local role names
naming_conventions.text: Clear local roles use short conventional names such as gobj, cam_gobj, cobj, fog, lobj, jobj, child, target, root, joint, matanim, count, idx, angle, x, z, scale.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declarations in gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_801A9094, gm_801A9630

naming_conventions.name: fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSet* helpers
naming_conventions.text: gm_801A7B00 calls fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSetTranslateX/Y/Z, fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSetRotationY, and fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSetScaleX/Y/Z; the PR slice does not explain whether these names are temporary matching shims or accepted helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSet* calls in gm_801A7B00

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK was used in several recovered functions with sizes 0x30, 0x20, 0x68, 0x88, and 8, indicating stack-shape steering for matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK in gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_801A8D54, gm_801A9094, gm_801A9630
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards require explicit objdiff/build evidence for stack padding; the bot report gives match percentages but the PR body does not explain each PAD_STACK need.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Two inline count helpers were introduced for fn_801A7FB4, and a wrapper gm_801A8114_inline calls gm_801A8114 from gm_801A9630.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801A7FB4_inline, fn_801A7FB4_inline2, gm_801A8114_inline
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence shows matching effect for fn_801A7FB4 but does not provide rationale for why the inline shapes are source-authentic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: raw header assert expansion left in recovered body
assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: gm_801A9094 contains explicit __assert("jobj.h", 0x2F5U, "joint") and __assert("jobj.h", 0x2F7U, "jobj") around HSD_JObjLoadJoint/HSD_JObjAddChild logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert blocks in gm_801A9094
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards say identifiable expanded header asserts should usually be mapped back to existing helpers/inlines; this PR slice provides no review discussion explaining why raw asserts remained.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The code uses GET_FOG(gobj) in fn_801A7FB4 and GET_JOBJ(...) before walking JObj children in gm_801A7B00 and gm_801A9630.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: GET_FOG in fn_801A7FB4; GET_JOBJ in gm_801A7B00 and gm_801A9630
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The loaded header-inlines standard says GET_JOBJ should be used only when local evidence supports that access shape; the diff shows usage but no explanatory evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify raw jobj.h assert cleanup for HSD_JObjLoadJoint/AddChild patterns
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2424 leaves raw __assert("jobj.h", 0x2F5U, "joint") and __assert("jobj.h", 0x2F7U, "jobj") in gm_801A9094. The loaded header-inlines/assert standards already warn against retaining expanded asserts when a header inline/helper is identifiable; curator may want to collect this as an example or non-example after checking current source and baselib helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: raw __assert blocks in gm_801A9094
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR slice shows the pattern but lacks review rationale; route for curator review rather than accepting a new rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Document inline wrappers as evidence-required matching tactics
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2424 introduces fn_801A7FB4_inline, fn_801A7FB4_inline2, and gm_801A8114_inline. The bot report supports fn_801A7FB4 matching, but the PR does not explain whether these helpers reflect original source or are matching shims.

source_update_candidates.reason: Could be folded into existing matching-tactics evidence guidance if curator finds recurring cases.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval details; the loaded slice has no review comments or review records.
Do not promote fake_tyfall_HSD_JObjSet* names as accepted naming conventions; the diff shows use but provides no rationale.
Do not claim gm_801A7B00, gm_801A85E4, gm_801A9094, or gm_801A9630 fully matched; the bot report lists them as improvements below 100%.
Do not treat PAD_STACK or inline wrapper use as generally acceptable from this PR alone; the loaded standards require narrow verifier evidence and this slice only gives aggregate bot percentages.
